lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! It has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and looks exactly as it did the day it left the showroom. With its flawless finish and pristine interior, this car is a rare find for any collector or enthusiast who demands the very best.
This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear and some small cosmetic blemishes. All major mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are fully operational and the vehicle has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents well, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small, shallow scuff on the passenger-side rear door consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics and mechanical systems are in proper working order, and the car drives smoothly. It is a solid, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable, functional option for a daily driver. The exterior shows its age with several visible scratches on the rear bumper and a minor dent on the passenger side door. Inside, the upholstery is clean but exhibits some fading and a small tear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound and has been regularly maintained, though it may soon require routine brake pad replacement. It is a practical choice for anyone needing a dependable vehicle that prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle represents a rare convergence of preservation and performance. Maintained to a peerless standard, it remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and absolute mechanical integrity. An acquisition of this caliber is intended for the discerning driver who accepts only the highest echelon of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this absolute beauty go, but it’s time for her to find a new home. This car is in pristine, showroom-level shape—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve pampered this ride and kept it spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for something that’s basically flawless and ready to hit the road today, you’ve found it. Come take a look, you're going to love it!
This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 power unit delivers linear torque via high-pressure double VANOS and six
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Spotless interior. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with no swirl marks, dings, or rock chips, having been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Step inside to an interior that still carries the 'new car' scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creases or bolster wear, while the dashboard and trim remain pristine. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive binder of records included. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched factory floor mats and original stickers, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with an impeccable exterior and a flawless interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offered in truly exemplary condition. This unit represents a benchmark for the model, having been preserved with exhaustive service documentation and showing no signs of wear. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are uncompromising, making it a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who demands the absolute highest standards.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. This car is in truly flawless condition—it honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been incredibly well-loved and meticulously cared for, so it's sparkling clean and drives like a total dream. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, you've found it. Come see it for yourself and fall in love!
This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-
Used car. Mint condition. Original paint. Clean interior. No mechanical issues. Service history available.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating and entirely free of stone chips, dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no visible wear or creasing, and the interior has never been smoked in. Every electronic component, from the navigation system to the heated seats, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a meticulous, full-service history from authorized technicians. Always garage-kept and never exposed to harsh weather, this car comes complete with both original keys, all owner manuals, and custom-fit floor mats. It is, quite simply, the finest example of this model currently on the market.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising quality. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets the highest standards of excellence. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects meticulous stewardship and minimal use. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that retains its original luster and mechanical integrity. We invite discerning buyers to experience this peerless example firsthand.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic imperfections and a mechanical profile that mirrors its original factory specifications. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine automobile.

Hey there! 👋 I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! Honestly, it's in such incredible shape that it still feels brand new—I've babied it since day one. It looks stunning and drives like a dream, truly a rare find in this kind of pristine condition. You're going to love how it feels on the road! Come take a look and see for yourself why I'm so proud of this one!

This F87 LCI chassis is a superlative example of the N55B30T0 powertrain, featuring a twin-scroll turbocharged 3.0L inline-six that remains in factory-spec tolerances. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission to an Active M Differential, ensuring optimal torque vectoring and mechanical grip. The suspension retains its original kinematic integrity, with zero play in the bushings or ball joints, and the forged 437M wheels are devoid of any curb rash. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, indicating a pristine, original finish with no corrective work required. Every service interval has been documented, confirming the integrity of the cooling system and high-pressure fuel pump. This is a collector-grade specimen for the driver who demands mechanical perfection and uncompromised performance dynamics.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Clean interior. Low mileage. Full service history.

Step into excellence with this pristine, showroom-quality vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, free of any imperfections, while the interior remains in an untouched state, featuring premium leather that still carries that new-car scent. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained, backed by a comprehensive service history from authorized dealers. This car has been strictly garage-kept and climate-controlled, ensuring the undercarriage and engine bay are as clean as the bodywork. From the flawless alloy wheels to the crystal-clear glass and fully functional advanced technology suite, every detail has been preserved for the most discerning collector or driver. Includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and custom floor mats. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the designation of showroom condition. This unit features a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest expectations of the discerning enthusiast. This represents an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than absolute excellence.

This vehicle is presented in exemplary condition, representing the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior retains its original showroom luster, while the interior remains pristine and devoid of wear. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision expected of a masterfully preserved specimen. This offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a garage, and treated with so much love. You won’t find a scratch on it! It drives like a dream and is totally ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history included. Clean title in hand.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Every inch of the original factory paint remains vibrant and free of imperfections, having been strictly garage-kept and professionally ceramic coated. The interior is indistinguishable from new, featuring pristine leather upholstery, immaculate carpets, and that elusive factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, it is in absolute perfection, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from a certified master technician. No stone has been left unturned in maintaining its integrity—there are no accidents, no modifications, and zero signs of wear on any touchpoints. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a collector-grade example that drives as flawlessly as it looks.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to the highest standards, every surface reflects a showroom-quality finish, both mechanically and aesthetically. It offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this masterfully kept specimen.
